title: Cybereason - Download Close File
content:
This playbook aborts a file download operation which is in progress based on the Malop ID and username provided.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cybereason pack (Cybereason, partner-supported).

Inputs — malopGUID: The unique ID assigned by the Cybereason platform for the Malop.; Username: The complete Cybereason user name string for the user performing the request..

Integrations/scripts used: Cybereason.
